Landing.manifestQuote: Movement is the simplest gift we can give each other. We built it for every body, every age - and nobody pays a thing.
Landing.value1Body: English, Polish, Italian and Ukrainian - built with refugees from Ukraine in mind from day one. WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility: large type, generous touch targets, full screen-reader support.
Landing.value2Title: A new plan every day. Made for you.
Landing.value2Body: Claude AI puts together 3–5 exercises with your age, fitness, equipment and the weather outside in mind. Ten categories - including green sports and pair workouts (think grandparent + grandchild).
Landing.value3Title: Off the screen, into real life.
Landing.value3Body: Move & Improve Days and the Intergenerational Sports Olympics - across Poland and Italy. The app goes with the trainers, runs group sessions and remembers every participant.
Landing.lede: A free AI training companion designed for everyone - kids, parents, seniors, refugees, people with disabilities. Adapts to your fitness, equipment, weather and goals.
Landing.trustLine: Built for 260+ participants · Move & Improve Days · Sports Olympics
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to move - every day
Landing.featuresLede: Built around what actually works for real people: smart recommendations, motivation that lasts, and a community that moves together.
Landing.feature1Body: Daily training tailored to your age, fitness, equipment and the weather outside. No two days the same.
Landing.feature2Body: Built for kids, adults, seniors and refugees - with accessible UI, four languages, and clear instructions.
Landing.feature3Body: Streaks, badges, and the #SmartMoveChallenge feed turn solo workouts into a shared movement.
Landing.diff1Body: Pouring rain? Get an indoor plan. Sunny? Plogging or Nordic walking outdoors.
Landing.diff2Body: English, Polish, Italian and Ukrainian - refugees included from day one.
Landing.diff3Body: Tai-chi, Nordic walking, plogging, ultimate frisbee - sport for the planet, not against it.
Landing.diff4Body: WCAG 2.1 AA accessible. Senior-friendly fonts and touch targets. No paywall, ever.
Landing.howItWorksTitle: Three steps to your first plan
Landing.step1Body: Email and password. No credit card. Free forever.
Landing.step2Body: Age, fitness level, equipment you have, your city for weather. Five quick questions.
Landing.step3Body: Claude AI builds 3-5 exercises tailored to you, your weather, and your goals. Mark them done, build streaks, earn badges.
Landing.ctaSectionBody: Sign up in 30 seconds. Tell us about yourself. Get your first AI plan today.
Landing.freeForever: Free forever - no card, no hidden costs
Landing.faqLede: Everything you might want to know before starting.
Landing.faq1Answer: Yes. The app is co-funded by the European Union under Erasmus+ Sport. There's no payment, no subscription, no hidden costs. We're committed to keeping it free for at least 24 months after the project ends.
Landing.faq2Answer: Anyone aged 6 to 120 who wants to move more - kids, parents, seniors, refugees, people with disabilities. The app adapts to your fitness level and equipment, so you can start exactly where you are.
Landing.faq3Answer: No. Many exercises are body-weight only. If you have a yoga mat, resistance bands, dumbbells, a bike, or just a park nearby, the app will use that too. You tell us in onboarding.
Landing.faq4Answer: We use Claude - Anthropic's most advanced model - to generate a fresh plan every day based on your profile, the local weather, your equipment, and your goals. Plans never repeat exactly the same.
Landing.faq5Answer: Yes. Your data stays inside the European Union - full stop. The app runs on EU servers (Vercel + Supabase, hosted in Frankfurt and Dublin); nothing is replicated to the United States, Russia, or anywhere outside the EU. We follow GDPR, so you can export everything or delete your account at any time, and no third party receives your profile or workout history.
Landing.faq6Question: Can I use it during the Move & Improve Days events?
Landing.faq6Answer: Absolutely - that's a core part of the project. Sign up, do the onboarding, and bring the app to the events. Trainers will use it to lead group sessions and track progress.

Mockup.greeting: Rain outside - we're staying in. Easy on the knees, strong through the core. Let's go.

Footer.cofundedBody: FitGenerations Smart TrAIner is co-funded by the Erasmus+ Programme of the European Union, under the Sport - Small-scale Cooperation Partnerships strand (project 101245857).
Footer.disclaimer: Funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the European Education and Culture Executive Agency (EACEA). Neither the European Union nor EACEA can be held responsible for them.

Auth.trainerHint: Trainers can create group codes for Move & Improve Days and see a live dashboard for each group.

errors.wrongPassword: That password doesn't match. Try again or reset your password.
errors.accountNotFound: There's no account with this email yet.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters, ideally with an uppercase letter and a number.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first - check your inbox for the activation link.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.
errors.serverError: Something's wrong on our side. Try again in a moment.

Onboarding.title: Tell us about you
Onboarding.subtitle: We'll use this to build a plan that fits your day.
Onboarding.fitnessQuestion: How would you describe your fitness?
Onboarding.equipmentQuestion: What do you have at hand?
Onboarding.goalQuestion: What matters most to you right now?
Onboarding.partnerQuestion: Do you train with a partner? (e.g. grandparent + grandchild)
Onboarding.groupCodeHint: Got a code from a trainer or Move & Improve Day? Enter it to join the group.

Plan.regenerateRateLimited: You just generated a plan - wait {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}} before trying again.
Plan.regenerateFailed: Something went wrong - try again in a moment.
Plan.allDoneBody: Come back tomorrow to keep your {count}-day streak alive. Tomorrow's plan is already on its way.
Plan.partnerBannerBody: You said you train with someone - the AI mixes in pair exercises (think grandparent + grandchild) so you can move together.

Trainer.upgradeBody: This area is for trainers running Move & Improve Days or group sessions.
Trainer.upgradeAnonHint: Create an account and tick "I'm a trainer" to unlock the dashboard.
Trainer.upgradeParticipantHint: Your current account is set up as a participant.
Trainer.upgradeContactSupport: Ask the project team to upgrade your account if you should be a trainer.
Trainer.dashboardLede: {count, plural, =0 {No groups yet - create your first one.} one {You manage 1 group.} other {You manage # groups.}}
Trainer.emptyHint: Create one to share a code with your participants and see live attendance.
Trainer.howStep1: Click "New group" and pick a memorable code (e.g. GLIWICE1, POTENZA1).
Trainer.howStep2: Share the code with your participants before the session.
Trainer.howStep3: Each participant enters the code in their Settings (one-time setup).
Trainer.howStep4: Open the group page on your phone or laptop to see who's joined and active today.
Trainer.createSubtitle: Pick a name and a short code. Share the code with your participants.
Trainer.formNameHint: What participants will see when they open the group page.
Trainer.formCodeHint: 4-12 letters and numbers. Uppercase, no spaces. This is what participants type.
Trainer.formCityHint: Where the group meets. Helps the AI tailor outdoor exercises to local weather.

errors.invalidCode: Code must be 4-12 uppercase letters and numbers (e.g. GLIWICE1).
errors.codeTaken: Someone is already using this code. Pick a different one.
errors.notTrainer: Only trainer accounts can create groups.
errors.db: Something went wrong saving the group. Try again.

Settings.title: Your settings
Settings.subtitle: Update your profile - we'll adjust tomorrow's plan to match.

Tutorial.slide1Body: FitGenerations builds a short plan of 3-5 exercises for you each day. The AI matches them to your age, fitness level, available equipment and even the weather outside.
Tutorial.slide2Body: Each exercise has a duration, a short tip and a YouTube demo. Mark them done as you go - the app builds your streak and unlocks badges along the way.
Tutorial.slide3Body: Training with a grandparent or grandchild? Turn on Pair mode and get exercises designed for two. Joining a Move & Improve Day? Your trainer will give you a group code to enter.
Tutorial.slide4Body: FitGenerations works right away, without an account - so the barrier to entry is zero. If you want your streak, badges and workout history to sync across phone and laptop, create a free account. Are you a trainer? Tick "I'm a trainer" when signing up - you'll unlock a dedicated dashboard where you create the group codes for your Move & Improve Day sessions.

Group.title: Group {code}
Group.invalidCode: That group code doesn't look right. Codes are 4–12 letters and numbers.
Group.empty: No one has joined this group yet.
Group.emptyHint: Share the code {code} with your trainer or the participants of your Move & Improve Day. Once they enter it in their profile, they'll show up here.
Group.howStep1: A trainer or organiser picks a short code (e.g. POTENZA1) and shares it.
Group.howStep2: Every participant opens their settings and enters the code {code}.
Group.howStep3: This page shows live stats for the whole group - without exposing anyone's personal data.

Challenge.intro: Inspire others. Record a 15-30 second video of you moving - yoga, walk, dance, anything - and share the link with your community. Together we make movement go viral.
Challenge.submitted: Thanks for sharing! Your video will inspire others.
Challenge.feedEmpty: Be the first to share. Make it count.

History.title: Your activity
History.empty: No activity yet - start with today's plan.

Badges.title: Your badges
Badges.emptyEarned: No badges yet - log your first workout to earn one.

Events.title: Move with us. In person.
Events.intro: Four events across Poland and Italy - open to every generation, every fitness level, every age. Come find us.
Events.midDescription: A full day of sport across generations: warm-ups, functional training, team games, balance stations. Plus health workshops on recovery, nutrition and injury prevention.
Events.olympicsDescription: Ten competitions: 3x3 football, beach volleyball, one-basket basketball, pétanque, target throwing, an intergenerational obstacle course, a relay, ultimate frisbee, speedminton and giant outdoor chess. Awards ceremony to close.
Events.joinBody: Sign up in the app and hold your spot. Free, in four languages, accessible. No card.

Errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.templateNotice: [TEMPLATE - replace with lawyer-reviewed text before production]
Privacy.intro: This page explains what personal data FitGenerations Smart TrAIner (FGST) collects, why we collect it, and how you can control it. The app is co-funded by the European Union under Erasmus+ Sport and follows the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
Privacy.controller: Data controller. The controller of your personal data is the FGST project consortium. For data-protection questions, contact the project team at the address listed in the Contact section below.
Privacy.dataCollected: Data we collect. Account email and password hash (handled by Supabase Auth). Onboarding answers: age, fitness level, equipment, goals, city. Activity logs: which exercises you complete and when. Optional: a video link you submit to the public #SmartMoveChallenge feed.
Privacy.purpose: Why we use your data. To generate a personalised daily plan, to keep track of your streak and badges, to show group-level statistics to the trainer running your Move & Improve Day, and to evaluate the project's reach as required by our Erasmus+ funder.
Privacy.legalBasis: Legal basis. We rely on your consent (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR) to process onboarding data and your performance of the user agreement (Article 6(1)(b) GDPR) to provide the account itself. Aggregate, anonymised statistics for the funder rely on legitimate interest (Article 6(1)(f) GDPR).
Privacy.retention: How long we keep it. Account data is kept while your account is active. If you delete your account, the data is removed within 30 days. Anonymous, aggregate usage statistics may be retained for the duration of the Erasmus+ project reporting period.
Privacy.rights: Your rights. You can access, correct, export or delete your data at any time from the Settings page. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your national data-protection authority.
Privacy.thirdParties: Third parties. The app runs on EU-based infrastructure: Vercel (Frankfurt) for hosting and Supabase (Dublin) for the database. AI plans are generated by Anthropic's Claude API, which processes your prompt under a data-processing agreement and does not train on your data. No marketing or analytics third parties receive your data.
Privacy.contact: Contact. For any privacy question or to exercise your rights, write to the project coordinator at the address shown in the project's public Erasmus+ record (project 101245857).

Terms.title: Terms of service
Terms.intro: These terms govern your use of FitGenerations Smart TrAIner (FGST). The app is provided free of charge as part of the Erasmus+ Sport project 101245857. By creating an account you agree to these terms.
Terms.eligibility: Eligibility. FGST is open to anyone aged 6 to 120. Users under 16 must have a parent or guardian who agrees to these terms and the privacy policy on their behalf.
Terms.accountResponsibility: Your account. You are responsible for keeping your password safe and for activity that happens under your account. Please tell us immediately if you suspect unauthorised access.
Terms.acceptableUse: Acceptable use. Do not upload illegal, harmful or offensive content. Do not attempt to disrupt the service, scrape data, or circumvent authentication. Trainer accounts must only be used to manage genuine Move & Improve Day groups.
Terms.disclaimer: Health disclaimer. The exercise plans are AI-generated suggestions, not medical advice. Talk to a doctor before starting a new training programme, especially if you have a health condition. Stop if anything hurts.
Terms.liability: Limitation of liability. The app is provided as-is. To the maximum extent permitted by law, the project consortium is not liable for damages arising from use of the app, except in cases of intent or gross negligence.
Terms.changes: Changes. We may update these terms to reflect new features or legal requirements. We will notify you in the app before any material change takes effect.
Terms.contact: Contact. Questions about these terms go to the project coordinator listed in the Erasmus+ public record (project 101245857).

Account.deleteIntro: You can delete your FGST account at any time. This page explains what happens when you do.
Account.deleteWarning: CRITICAL: This action is irreversible. Your profile, daily plans, activity history, earned badges and any submitted challenge videos will be permanently removed within 30 days. Anonymous, aggregated statistics already shared with the Erasmus+ funder cannot be revoked.
Account.deleteConfirmLabel: Type DELETE (in capital letters) to confirm
Account.deleteError: We couldn't delete the account. Please try again or contact the project team.
Account.exportIntro: Download a JSON file with everything FGST stores about you: profile, plans, activity logs, badges and challenge videos. The download starts as soon as you click the button below.
Account.exportError: We couldn't prepare the export. Please try again.

Consent.message: FGST uses essential cookies to keep you signed in. We don't run analytics or advertising trackers. You can read the details in our privacy policy.
